description: A farm has just received a new batch of animals. The manager needs to follow the standard quarantine protocol to prevent introducing diseases.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the farm's standard operating procedure (SOP) for new animal quarantine.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the 30-day quarantine protocol document.

nodes.task_description: Create a schedule of tasks based on the protocol, including initial health checks, vaccinations, and diagnostic testing.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a checklist of tasks with due dates for the new animals.

nodes.task_description: Set a reminder for the end of the 30-day quarantine period to clear the animals for introduction to the main herd.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sets a calendar reminder.
